title: ASB Metabolomics Skill Collection v2 (metabolomics-v0.1.0)
description: Curated, evidence-grounded skill and software-tool collection for computational LC-MS/MS metabolomics, generated by the AgenticScienceBuilder (ASB) pipeline: 5,865 skills across 909 tools distilled from 568 peer-reviewed method papers, each anchored to verbatim evidence and EDAM-annotated. Preliminary public release. API generation costs sponsored by CNRS and Universite Cote d'Azur. License: collection content CC-BY-4.0; code Apache-2.0; verbatim quotes under fair use.

creators.name: Nothias, Louis-Félix
creators.affiliation: Holobiomics Lab, Institut de Chimie de Nice (ICN), CNRS UMR 7272 / Université Côte d'Azur

notes: Generated by the AgenticScienceBuilder pipeline (mixed-model: Claude Opus 4.8 + Haiku 4.5; OpenAI embeddings). Funding/sponsor: CNRS and Université Côte d'Azur. The raw ASB capsules and benchmark layer (full traceability) will be deposited subsequently.
